===================
=== 2001-10-19 Staples Center, Los Angeles, California, USA.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan and his band:
Staples Center
Los Angeles, California
October 19, 2001

Down the pipeline to sunny Madrid

Olav ASM (additional sound master):
DVD+R > SHN files copied to HDD > mkwACT096f (checksum.md5=OK) > decoded to WAV > CoolEdit 2000 (checked; all tracks OK cept dropout between Honest With Me and Blowin In The Wind; now removed and not audible) > T-RackS v2.0 (overall volume boosted +4.0dB; misbalanced tracks corrected + 1.1 - 2.1dB; Tube-Comp ON to add bundled softness, clearer sound and healthy vibrato; stereo enhancement +2.7dB; no overall EQ on any track!) > FLAC frontend (aligned on sector boundaries) > encoded to FLAC files > DIME

IMHO: an excellent to superb recording

SETLIST:
01. Wait For The Light To Shine (Fred Rose)
02. Song To Woody
03. It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding)
04. Searching For A Soldier's Grave (Johnnie Wright, Jim Anglin, Jack Anglin)
05. Tweedle Dee And Tweedle Dum
06. I Don't Believe You (She Acts Like We Never Have Met)
07. High Water (for Charley Patton)
08. Most Likely You Go Your Way (And I'll Go Mine)
09. Masters Of War
10. Mama, You Been On My Mind
11. It's All Over Now, Baby Blue

12. Summer Days
13. Sugar Baby
14. Drifter's Escape
15. Leopard-Skin Pill-Box Hat
16. Things Have Changed
17. Like A Rolling Stone
18. Knockin' On Heaven's Door
19. Honest With Me
20. Blowin' In The Wind
21. Rainy Day Women # 12 & 35


Concert # 1358 of The Never-Ending Tour
Concert # 10 of the 2001 US Fall Tour
2001 concert # 81. 

Concert # 263 with the 12th Never-Ending Tour Band:
Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar)
Charlie Sexton (guitar)
Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar)
Tony Garnier (bass)
David Kemper (drums & percussion)

14, 911, 18, 20 acoustic with the band
6, 10, 14 Bob Dylan (harmonica)
1, 4, 18, 20 Larry Campbell & Charlie Sexton (backup vocals)

NOTE: Live debut of High Water (for Charley Patton)

10 new songs (47%) compared to previous concert
2 new songs for this tour

Stereo audience recording, 125 minutes

* * * Enjoy your Bobby Hobby * * *
